ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the item */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was last updated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's main image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is currently active for sale */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the item based on user feedback */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being scored */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for whom the score is calculated */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used to calculate the score */,
  "score_value" TEXT /* Calculated score value */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was calculated */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context or metadata about the scoring event */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the score is the most current for the item and user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the algorithm (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used by the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the viewed item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who viewed the item */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was viewed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the view event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_views_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_clicks" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clicked item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who clicked the item */,
  "click_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was clicked */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the click event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_clicks_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_clicks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchased item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who purchased the item */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item purchased */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the purchase */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Indicates if the purchase is a gift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_purchases_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item the feedback is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user would recommend the item */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context or metadata about the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm being measured */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., precision, recall) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the metric was measured */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the performance was measured (e.g., production, staging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
